headline: Will DXCM's G7 Uptake Continue to Drive Top-line Growth in Q1?
summary: DexCom's Q1 results may see strong growth from G7 uptake and CGM demand, but pricing mix and rising investments could weigh on margins.

raw.headline: Will DXCM's G7 Uptake Continue to Drive Top-line Growth in Q1?

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Underweight on Henry Schein, Raises Price Target to $64
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Erin Wright   maintains Henry Schein (NASDAQ:HSIC) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $61 to $64.
